gaps.name: Physics notation and semantic-drift gap
gaps.basis: physics autoformalization exposes notational collapse and abstraction elevation risks

gaps.name: Constructive QFT formal-certificate gap
gaps.basis: Lean formalization of free bosonic Euclidean QFT demonstrates external theorem-certificate intake surface

gaps.name: Yang-Mills mass-gap boundary gap
gaps.basis: official open frontier: no proof of quantum Yang-Mills mass gap is known

gaps.name: Spectral-gap decidability boundary gap
gaps.basis: general spectral-gap problem is undecidable for specified quantum many-body Hamiltonian families

gaps.name: GR regularity and determinism boundary gap
gaps.basis: Strong Cosmic Censorship depends on PDE, global hyperbolicity, extendibility, regularity class, and genericity choices

gaps.name: Quantum-information proof-gap intake gap
gaps.basis: Generalized Quantum Stein's Lemma had an identified proof gap and later Lean formalization/correction route

gaps.name: Probabilistic Euclidean QFT foundation gap
gaps.basis: active program seeks unified probabilistic foundation for Euclidean QFT and non-perturbative analysis

boundary: This artifact classifies mathematical-physics gaps against the toolkit. It introduces no new physics theorem, no scientific payload, and no theorem promotion.
